calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-284 Phase 3 param-sweep diagnostic after EXQ-478 FAIL
items.note: Phase 3 param-sweep diagnostic after EXQ-478 FAIL (wired-but-inert). 5 arms x 2 seeds; SD-029 curriculum ON for all arms to escape OFF-arm monostrategy confound. Gates B.2 stub buildout for V3-EXQ-445d/449c/455a.
